seo.title: Plans and Pricing - Custom AI Solutions | onsmartAI
seo.description: Choose the ideal plan for your company. Custom AI solutions with 30-day implementation. Flexible plans for all business sizes.

hero.title: Choose the Ideal Plan

hero.description: 30-day implementation with guaranteed results. Choose the plan that best fits your business.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Ideal for small companies that want to get started

business.name: Business

guarantee.title: Our Guarantee
guarantee.description: 30 days to test without commitment. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund your money.

questions.question: Can I cancel at any time?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your plan at any time without cancellation fees.

questions.question: Is technical support included?
questions.answer: Yes, all plans include technical support. The level varies according to the chosen plan.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Basic implementation takes 30 days. Enterprise plans can have custom schedules.
